---
title: "Air Quality Explorer"
description: "Machine-learning assisted air quality analysis and visualization for urban environments."
date: "2025-06-01"
image: thumbnail.jpg
categories: [App, Shiny, Air Quality, ML]
---

## About

An interactive Shiny app exploring urban air quality in **Karlsruhe**. It combines open
[Open-Meteo](https://open-meteo.com) data — daily weather (temperature, precipitation, wind)
and hourly air-quality observations (NO₂) for 2024 — and uses a machine-learning model to
relate meteorology to pollutant levels. Explore concentrations, temporal patterns and
model-derived insights for urban monitoring.

## Live Demo

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://anayananayana.shinyapps.io/Luft_KA_AI/"
        width="100%" height="650" style="border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:8px;">
</iframe>
```

[Open app in new tab](https://anayananayana.shinyapps.io/Luft_KA_AI/){.btn .btn-primary}

## Stack

[R]{.badge-skill} [Shiny]{.badge-skill} [Open-Meteo]{.badge-skill} [Machine Learning]{.badge-skill}
